sections.paragraph:
a knee, in sing. once Isa 45:23. (Syr. ܒܪܘܽܟ, ܒܘܽܪܟܐܳ, Eth. ብርክ፡ id. Ch. transp. אַרְכּוּבָא.)

Dual בִּרְכַּיִם constr. בִּרְכֵּי knees, not used of two merely, but even of all. כָּל־בִּרְכַּיִם “all knees,” Eze 7:17 21:12 . מַיִם בִּרְכַּיִם “water reaching to the knees,” Eze 47:4. Upon the knees (עַל בִּרְכַּיִם) where new-born children are received by their parents or nurses, Gen 30:3 50:23 Job 3:12, and where children are fondled by their parents, Isa 66:12.

ברך

Ch. id. Dan 6:11.
